name: revenant-dark
description: Night-ops sibling of revenant-light. Deep near-black field (faint olive undertone), Signal Orange as the primary action/status accent, warm concrete-cream text. For dark-default ops surfaces and night trading sessions.
brand_rule: --brand = neutral concrete-cream fill (NOT orange); --accent = signal orange, reserved for ONE hero action/metric per view. Deliberate deviation from lore-dark (which collapses --brand onto its accent).

type.register_note: Same dual-register layout discipline as revenant-light.

motion.note: Sharp, no overshoot — precision-instrument feel, snappier than Lore.

shadow_note: Deep black drop-shadow + faint signal-orange ring (clearance / system-active glow).
